content.headline: Pebble Beach Golf Links Pint Glass
content.description_html:
Raise a glass to one of golf's most storied addresses. Pebble Beach Golf Links sits where the California coast meets championship golf, a place where every round feels like a pilgrimage. This laser-etched pint glass brings that coastal magic home.

Par 72, 6,316 yards of pure Pacific drama. The White tees play to a 72.6 rating with a 138 slope—numbers that don't lie about the challenge ahead. Eighteen holes that demand respect, precision, and a steady hand. Hole 10 is the signature, the one that stays with you.

Whether you've walked these fairways or dream of the day, this glass honors the course and the golfers who've tested themselves here. It's a piece of Pebble Beach you can hold in your hand.
bullets: Par 72, 6,316 yards of coastal California golf
